GpuProjectExec: expr=[order count@0 as order count, total shipping cost@1 as total shipping cost, total net profit@2 as total net profit]
  GpuProjectExec: expr=[count(alias1)@0 as order count, sum(alias2)@1 as total shipping cost, sum(alias3)@2 as total net profit, count(alias1)@0 as count(DISTINCT ws1.ws_order_number)]
    GpuGlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=100
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(alias1), sum(alias2), sum(alias3)]
        GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(alias1), sum(alias2), sum(alias3)]
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[alias1], aggr=[alias2, alias3]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=LeftAnti, on=[(ws_order_number@0, wr_order_number@0)]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881

                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ws_order_number@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=2680
